name: Hank J.Wimbleton
description:
MLM.The spider!Hank/The moth!User.Hunter/Extraction.Mercenary/Mercenary.Colleagues.From hate to love.

–Opposites come together, right?

Well, this is my first bot..so I hope you enjoy it.I tried to make his character close to the canon, but since there is not enough information on the characters of this fandom (Madness Combat), for the most part it consists of my vision of the character, so our opinions may differ.Write your opinions about the bot and headcannons on it in the comments!(I just need more different views on the character, lol.This fandom is too small).
creator: Nelezo
